calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Filing Notice Of Appeal Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roxanna Iran, of Littler Mendelson, P.C., Tel. 415.677.3195, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JOHN DORICKO'S Motion For Order Filing Notice Of Appeal Nunc Pro Tunc is granted. The Court orders that the notice of appeal is deemed filed on April 3, 2015, nunc pro tunc. The April 3, 2015, filing is timely pursuant to Schoutens v. Sup. Crt. (1950) 97 Cal.App.2d 855, 857. The Court has jurisdiction to issue the nunc pro tunc order. "A document is 'filed' when it is actually delivered to the clerk of the court during office hours, even if the clerk erroneously refuses to file it." Eliceche v. Federal Land Bank Assoc. (2002) 103 Cal.App.4th 1349, 1361. The Court can reasonably infer that the clerk erroneously rejected the filing because it lacked a cover sheet. See CRC 3.220. Order signed in open court. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Filing Notice Of Appeal Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Continued To Jul-27-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN DORICKO'S Motion For Order Filing Notice Of Appeal Nunc Pro Tunc is continued on the Court's motion to July 27, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
